records.next_action: Reject as positive evidence; replace with a natural family or prove the mask arises from a named hard problem.
records.rejection_reason: Apparent hardness depends on a deterministic mask/noise source rather than a natural algebraic problem family or reduction. This can hide a random table inside a concise generator.
